programs.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programs.desc: In Almería, the Garners help friends Lynn and Della balance a modern bolthole with a community feel. Charlotte Rodriguez treats Barry and Mandy to Alicante's sun-soaked options.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Paul and Debbie want a holiday home on the beautiful island of Fuerteventura where they can spend quality time together. Ben Hillman shows them what their £115k can buy in Caleta de Fuste.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Maggie and Alistair dream of swapping Scottish winters for the white sandy beaches of sunny Gran Canaria. Jasmine Harman lines up five fantastic holiday homes for their £350,000 budget.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: In and around the beautiful villages of Haute Vienne in southern France, Sara Damergi helps recently engaged Michelle and Steve find the perfect family holiday home for their £100k budget.

programs.title: Chateau DIY
programs.desc: Donna and Paul race to waterproof their basement as river levels rise. Eleanor and Ben peruse the Pyrenees for a new family home. Vivienne and Simon rush to finish their suite.

programs.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programs.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Catherine and Nigel's dated, 70s-style bungalow in Larne. Was the addition of a garage a love-it game changer.
